title: 6 people presumed drowned as RCMP lead recovery of sunken boat near Richmond, B.C.
description: An RCMP underwater recovery team is now searching for a capsized vessel that sank off the shores of Richmond, B.C., on Sunday.
text: An RCMP underwater recovery team is now searching for a capsized vessel that sank off the shores of Richmond, B.C., on Sunday.
speech_text:
6 people presumed drowned as RCMP lead recovery of sunken boat near Richmond, B.C.

An RCMP underwater recovery team is now searching for a capsized vessel that sank off the shores of Richmond, B.C., on Sunday.
thai_text: ทีมสํารวจ RCMP กําลังค้นหาเรือที่ล้มเหลว ที่จมลงที่ชายหาดริชมอนด์ ในกรุงเทพมหานคร เมื่อวันอาทิตย์ที่ผ่านมา.
